rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Introductory homily for the Homiliary in Honor of the Archangel Michael
Homily by the archbishop of Antioch
Excerpt of Miracle of Saint Michael from another source, inserted at this point in the codex
Homily by Yoḥannǝs, Bishop of Ethiopia, who came after Bishop Yǝśḥaq, on the conflict between the consort of King Arqadewos and John Chysostom
Homily by Yoḥannǝs, Bishop of Aksum on the family of Astäraniqos and Euphemia
Homily by Bishop Yoḥannǝs on the wicked wealthy man whose property was inherited by the son of his poor neighbor
Homily (anonymous) on the book of the angels that came from Jerusalem
Homily (anonymous) on not worshipping other gods
Homily (anonymous) on the need to make the angels sureties by honoring them
Synaxary Entry for Ḫǝdar: the mission of the Archangel to Joshua, son of Nun
Synaxary Entry for Taḫśaś: Mission of the Archangel to rescue the three holy children
Synaxary Entry for Ṭǝrr: Mission of the Archangel to save Jacob from the wrath of Esau
Synaxary Entry for Yäkkatit: Mission of the Archangel to Samson, the giant
Synaxary Entry for Mäggabit: Mission of the Archangel to Balaam
Synaxary Entry for Miyazya: Mission of the Archangel to the Prophet Jeremiah
Synaxary entry for Gǝnbot: Mission of the Archangel to Habakkuk
Synaxary entry for Säne: The building of the church of the Archangel in place of a pagan temple in Alexandria
Synaxary entry for Ḥamle: Mission to the camp of Sennacherib
Synaxary entry for Näḥase: Mission of the Archangel to the Emperor Constantine
Synaxary entry for Mäskäräm: Mission to Prophet Isaiah
Synaxary entry for Ṭǝqǝmt: Mission to Prophet Samuel
